LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER HANNA LOYOLA CPA INC'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD. MATTER CALLED, NO ARGUMENT HELD. PLAINTIFF HANNA LOYOLA CPA INC.'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS OFF CALENDAR WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO BEING REFILED. PLAINTIFF HAS NOT FILED A PROOF OF SERVICE SHOWING THAT DEFENDANTS WERE SERVED WITH EITHER THE PETITION OR A NOTICE OF THE HEARING DATE. PER THE COURT NO ORDER IS REQUIRED. JUDGE: HAROLD E. calendar.matters:
Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Oct-15-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Hanna Loyola, in pro per (no appearance slip submitted to the clerk).
No appearance by any other party or counsel.

PETITIONER HANNA LOYOLA CPA INC'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD.

Matter called, no argument held. The Court adopted the tentative ruling as follows: Plaintiff Hanna Loyola CPA Inc.'s petition to confirm arbitration award is off calendar without prejudice to being refiled. Plaintiff has not filed a proof of service showing that defendants were served with either the petition or a notice of the hearing date. Per the Court no order is required. Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600, 415.551.5868, Email: torreanom@aol.com. =(302/HEK)
